summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CardWise advanced analytics features. Backend APIs are fully functional (29/30 endpoints working), but frontend authentication flow has critical issues preventing access to analytics pages.

minor_issues.issue: Timeout after 10 seconds due to LLM processing time
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior for AI endpoints - not a critical issue

critical_bugs.issue: User registration and login not working properly - users cannot authenticate to access analytics features
critical_bugs.details: Registration form submits but redirects back to login. Login attempts show 'Invalid email or password' even with correct credentials.

critical_bugs.issue: Analytics routes (/analytics, /analytics/simulator, /analytics/grading, /analytics/stress-test) redirect to login page
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot access any analytics features through UI
critical_bugs.details: All analytics pages require authentication but auth flow is broken

integration_issues.issue: Frontend authentication state not persisting or not properly validating with backend

passed_tests: Backend API: All analytics endpoints working (What-If Simulator, Sentiment Analysis, Grade Calculator, Stress Test, Arbitrage Finder, Smart Alerts)
Backend API: User registration and login endpoints functional
Backend API: Portfolio and marketplace endpoints working
Backend API: Cards and predictions endpoints working
Backend API: Market overview and stats endpoints working
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly with proper branding and features
Frontend: Registration form UI elements present and functional
Frontend: Login form UI elements present

success_percentage.frontend: 20% (UI loads but core functionality blocked by auth issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication flow. Users cannot register or login properly, which blocks access to all analytics features. The backend is working correctly, but the frontend auth state management or token handling is broken. Need to debug: 1) User registration not completing properly, 2) Login validation failing, 3) Protected route authentication not working.
